news.paragraph: Alibaba is approaching a major catalyst with its Q4 earnings report expected around May 13. While news of Michael Burry backing the stock provides a positive signal, traders should also account for broader macroeconomic uncertainties including US-China trade tensions and upcoming PPI data. The imminent earnings release is likely to be the primary driver of near-term volatility.
